mapper.select: select brand_id FROM eb_product where is_del = 0 and is_recycle = 0 and is_show = 1 and audit_status in (0, 2) and (name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') or keyword like CONCAT('%', #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')) and marketing_type = 0

select category_id FROM eb_product where is_del = 0 and is_recycle = 0 and is_show = 1 and audit_status in (0, 2) and (name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') or keyword like CONCAT('%', #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')) and marketing_type = 0

SELECT p.id,p.image,p.name,p.is_show as isShow,p.category_id as categoryId,p.type, p.price,(p.sales + p.ficti) as sales,p.unit_name,p.stock, pc.name as categoryName FROM eb_product AS p left join eb_product_category AS pc on p.category_id = pc.id where p.is_del = 0 and p.is_recycle = 0 and p.audit_status in (0,2) and p.type in (0,2,5,6,8) and p.marketing_type = 0
and find_in_set(p.category_id, #{categoryId})
and p.is_show = #{isShow}
and p.name like CONCAT('%', #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
and find_in_set(p.mer_id, #{merIds})
order by p.id desc

SELECT p.id,p.image,p.name as name,p.keyword,p.category_id as categoryId,p.price,p.sales,p.stock,p.ficti, p.audit_status as auditStatus,p.reason,p.rank,m.name as merchantName,m.is_self as isSelf,p.rank,p.type, p.spec_type as specType FROM eb_product AS p right join eb_merchant AS m on p.mer_id = m.id where p.is_del = 0 and p.is_recycle = 0 and p.marketing_type = 0
and p.is_show = 1 and p.audit_status in (0,2)
and p.is_show = 0 and p.is_audit = 0 and p.audit_status in (0,2)
and p.audit_status = 1 and p.is_audit = 1
and p.audit_status = 3 and p.is_audit = 0
and p.mer_id in
#{item}
and m.is_self = #{self}
and find_in_set(#{cateId}, p.cate_id)
and find_in_set(p.category_id, #{categoryIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and (p.name like CONCAT('%', #{keywords, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') or p.keyword like CONCAT('%', #{keywords, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'))
and p.vip_price_type = #{vipPriceType}
and p.type = #{productType}
ORDER BY p.rank desc, p.id desc

SELECT p.id,p.image,p.name as name,p.price,p.ot_price as otPrice,p.price,p.sales,p.stock,p.ficti, p.unit_name as unitName,p.reason,p.mer_id as merId, -- m.name as merName,m.category_id as merCategoryId,m.type_id as merTypeId, p.category_id as categoryId,p.brand_id as brandId,p.vip_price as vipPrice,p.vip_price_type as vipPriceType FROM eb_product AS p -- right join eb_merchant AS m on p.mer_id = m.id where p.is_del = 0 and p.is_recycle = 0 and p.is_show = 1 and p.audit_status in (0,2) and p.marketing_type = 0 and p.type <> 1
and find_in_set(p.id, #{proIds})
and find_in_set(p.category_id, #{cids})
and find_in_set(p.brand_id, #{brandIds})
and find_in_set(p.mer_id, #{merIds})
${lastStr}
